title: cyananthus pusillus
intro: Cyananthus pusillus, also known as the Western Delphinium or Small Delphinium, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyananthus pusillus include treating various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
